task_completion.description: Verify the Odoo Calendar application is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo web interface is visible with the Calendar app active, showing a daily, weekly, or monthly calendar view.

task_completion.description: Verify the target event is located on the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event named 'Sales Pipeline Sync' is visible on the calendar grid, scheduled on a Friday from 3:00 PM to 4:00 PM (15:00 - 16:00).

task_completion.description: Verify the event details are opened to ensure it is the correct event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A popup or form view for 'Sales Pipeline Sync' is open, displaying details such as the attendees (Carol Martinez, Bob Williams, Isabel Santos) or the location (Sales Room).

task_completion.description: Verify the deletion process is initiated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Delete' button is being clicked on the event details popup/form, or an 'Ok'/'Confirm' button is being clicked on a deletion confirmation dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the event has been successfully removed from the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar view is visible for the target Friday, and the 3:00 PM to 4:00 PM time slot is empty. The 'Sales Pipeline Sync' event is no longer present.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interacting with the Odoo web UI, not a terminal window executing API scripts or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify the event was deleted using the application's built-in functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The deletion was performed via the Odoo UI's delete buttons and confirmation dialogs, rather than editing the event title to be blank or using browser developer tools to hide the element.

integrity.description: Verify that only the target event was deleted.
integrity.visual_evidence: If other events were visible on the calendar in earlier screenshots, they should still be present in the final screenshots, indicating the agent did not mass-delete or reset the calendar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Event Name: 'Sales Pipeline Sync'. Target Attendees: Carol Martinez, Bob Williams, Isabel Santos. Event Location: Sales Room. Event Time: Friday, 3:00 PM to 4:00 PM (15:00 to 16:00).
